bio: Toni Lontis is a Lifestyle Entrepreneur, Author, Speaker, Blogger, and International Tour Host whose life's work centers on helping women and the men who love them discover their passion, purpose, and voice. Through writing, speaking, mentoring, and her radio show and podcasts, she creates pathways for personal transformation and self-expression. Her multifaceted platform inspires audiences around the world to live boldly and authentically.
